label: ADM4
description: Level-4 administrative districts

label: ADM0
description: A 0-level district, normally a country past or present

label: ADM1
description: A 1st-level district (e.g., a U.S. state)

label: ADM2
description: A 2nd-level district (e.g., a U.S. county)

label: ADM3
description: A 3rd-level district (e.g., a U.S. city)

label: ADMD
description: A district defined as a development zone within a country

label: ADME
description: A district defined as an ecological zone within a country

label: ADML
description: NA

label: ADMX
description: A district without a clear level

label: ANY DOMAIN
description: Any category/domain. Excludes DATASETS.

label: ALL NODES
description: All category domains and datasets.

label: DATASET
description: A dataset for which SocioMap includes metadata on categories and/or variables

label: DIALECT
description: A languoid defined by a linguistic dialect

label: AREA
description: A category defined by its geographical boundary

label: ETHNICITY
description: A category of people defined by a shared origin which is often socially constructed. This can include categories defined by ethnicity, race, caste, religion, or ecological zone (e.g., hill people). It can be internally or externally defined depending on the source.

label: FAMILY
description: A languoid defined by a group of related languages

label: GENERIC
description: A general category used to organize other categories (e.g., Missing)

label: LANGUAGE
description: A languoid defined by a specific language

label: LANGUOID
description: A category defined by a linguistic tradition or group of related linguistic traditions

label: PPL
description: A district defined as a populated place

label: NATURAL
description: Natural features (e.g. bodies of water, mountain ranges)

label: RELIGION
description: A category defined by a religious tradition

label: VARIABLE
description: A variable

label: STONE
description: Any stone artifact

label: KINGDOM
description: A kingdom is the second highest taxonomic rank, just below domain.

label: FAUNA
description: Faunal remains.

label: PHYLUM
description: A phylum is a level of classification or taxonomic rank below kingdom and above class.

label: CLASS
description: A class is a level of classification or taxonomic rank below phylum and above order.

label: ORDER
description: A order is a level of classification or taxonomic rank below class and above family.

label: FAMILY
description: A family is a level of classification or taxonomic rank below order and above genus.

label: GENUS
description: A genus is a level of classification or taxonomic rank below family and above species.

label: SPECIES
description: A species is a level of classification or taxonomic rank below genus.

label: SUBGENUS
description: A subgenus is a level of classification or taxonomic rank below genus.

label: SUBSPECIES
description: A subspecices is a level of classification or taxonomic rank below species.

label: CULTURE
description: A recurring assemblage of types of artifacts, buildings and monuments from a specific period and region.

label: BOTANICAL
description: Objects derived from plant material.

label: PHYTOLITH
description: Microscopic particles of silica that form in plant tissues.

label: CERAMIC
description: A category combining ceramic types and wares.

label: CERAMIC_TYPE
description: A category of distinctive pottery traditions defined below the level of a ceramic ware.

label: CERAMIC_WARE
description: A category of distinctive pottery traditions containing ceramic types.

label: DATASET
description: A dataset for which ArchaMap includes metadata on categories and/or variables.

label: FEATURE
description: Physical features not represented by other labels.

label: REGION
description: A district defined by a dataset that encompasses a variety of geographic areas not directly corresponding to modern country, state, or county-level boundaries.

label: SITE
description: A district defined as an archaeology site.

label: PERIOD
description: A defined period of time.

label: PROJECTILE_POINT
description: A category combining projectile point types and clusters.

label: PROJECTILE_POINT_CLUSTER
description: A category combining related groups of projectile point types.

label: PROJECTILE_POINT_TYPE
description: A category of stone tools designed for use on an arrow or dart.

label: BIOTA
description: A category of living things or their remains.
